predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse
predicates.description: The person is the surviving spouse of the deceased whose estate has opened.

predicates.name: is_deceased_spouse
predicates.description: The person is the deceased whose estate has opened.

predicates.name: is_heir
predicates.description: The person is an heir of the deceased.

predicates.name: served_as_family_principal_residence_at_estate_opening
predicates.description: The immovable property served as the family's principal residence at the time the estate of the deceased opened.

predicates.name: property_subject_to_lease
predicates.description: The immovable property is subject to the given lease.

predicates.name: property_qualifies_for_lease_right
predicates.description: The immovable property served as the family principal residence at estate opening and is subject to the given lease, making it qualify for the surviving spouse lease right.

predicates.name: acquires_right_to_lease
predicates.description: The surviving spouse acquires the right to the lease of the immovable property that served as the family's principal residence at the time the estate opened.

predicates.name: excluded_from_lease_right
predicates.description: The person (heir other than the surviving spouse) is excluded from the right to the lease.
